title: Logic Connective Truth Table Builder
description: A visual guide showing how to construct truth tables for basic logical connectives (NOT, AND, OR, IF-THEN, IFF) by combining input proposition truth values.
relationships: Connectives operate on input propositions to produce a single truth value output
The output for each row is determined by applying the connective's specific rules to the input values
The complete truth table shows all possible combinations of input values and their corresponding outputs
